location.name: Art appraisers in Richmond, Virginia
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Richmond, Virginia.

listedAppraisers.name: Prestige Estate Services
listedAppraisers.description: Prestige Estate Services provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Paintings, Sculptures, Decorative Arts, Antique Furniture. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Alicia E Weaver (ISA CAPP)
listedAppraisers.description: Alicia E Weaver (ISA CAPP) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in 19th-20th Century Art, Americana, Decorative Arts. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Green Donation Consultants
listedAppraisers.description: Green Donation Consultants provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Charitable Donation Appraisals. With Since 2005 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals (AFAA)
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals (AFAA) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European Art, American Art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th-century works. With Decades of experience experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Escher Associates (EA)
listedAppraisers.description: Escher Associates (EA) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Paintings, Sculpture, Photography, Rare Books. With Established in 1984 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Page Art, Inc.
listedAppraisers.description: Page Art, Inc. provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Insurance Appraisals, Estate Valuations, Donation Appraisals, Litigation Appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Saylor Rice Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Saylor Rice Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Insurance Appraisals, Damage/Loss Appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Gurr Johns

listedAppraisers.name: Gates Antiques Ltd
listedAppraisers.description: Gates Antiques Ltd. provides antique and fine art appraisal services in Richmond, VA, offering both verbal and written appraisals at affordable rates. $50 for a verbal appraisal per item; $95 for the first typed item.

listedAppraisers.name: Blue Door Art & Antique Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Blue Door Art & Antique Appraisals, LLC is operated by Christine Vincent, ISA AM, providing professional art and antique appraisals serving Virginia including the Richmond area.

listedAppraisers.name: Virginia Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Virginia Fine Art Appraisals provides expert fine art and Virginia regional art appraisals for collectors, galleries, and institutions throughout the Richmond area.

listedAppraisers.name: James River Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: James River Art Appraisals has served the Richmond area for over 16 years, providing comprehensive appraisals for fine art, antiques, and Southern art collections.

listedAppraisers.name: Capital City Art Advisors
listedAppraisers.description: Capital City Art Advisors provides fine art appraisals and advisory services to collectors and institutions throughout the Richmond metropolitan area.
